metadata.title: CodeGraft - Structural Integrity Platform
metadata.description: Bridge the Reality-Intent Gap in your software architecture with AI-powered governance and visualization.

hero.description: The Structural Integrity Platform that unifies your codebase, documentation, and infrastructure into a living, AI-powered knowledge graph. See your architecture. Understand your drift. Govern your future.

features.title: Everything You Need to Govern Your Architecture
features.subtitle: From ingestion to visualization to action, CodeGraft provides the complete toolkit for structural integrity.

graphRag.title: GraphRAG Intelligence
graphRag.description: Our semantic knowledge graph understands the relationships between your code, documentation, and infrastructure. Ask questions in natural language and get accurate, context-aware answers.

visualization.title: 3D Architecture Visualization
visualization.description: WebGL-powered interactive maps of your entire software ecosystem. See data flows, dependencies, and drift in real-time with cinematic quality.

ingestion.title: Universal Ingestion
ingestion.description: Connect everything: Git repositories, Jira, Confluence, Terraform, Kubernetes, and more. Our plugin marketplace grows with your needs.

governance.title: Active Governance
governance.description: Policy-as-code with automated enforcement. Action triggers block risky deployments, create tickets, and notify stakeholders automatically.

personas.title: Persona-Tailored Insights
personas.description: Custom views for developers, architects, security engineers, and executives. Each role sees what matters most to them.

timeMachine.title: Architectural Time Machine
timeMachine.description: Scrub through your architecture's history. Understand exactly when drift occurred and what caused it.

ingest.title: 1. Ingest Everything
ingest.description: Connect your Git repos, cloud infrastructure, documentation, and project management tools. CodeGraft automatically builds a comprehensive knowledge graph.

analyze.title: 2. Analyze & Visualize
analyze.description: Our AI identifies architectural patterns, drift, and risks. Explore your system through interactive 3D visualizations and natural language queries.

govern.title: 3. Govern & Act
govern.description: Define policies, set up automated actions, and maintain structural integrity. Get alerts before problems become crises.

items.question: Can I switch plans at any time?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.

items.question: Is there a free trial for paid plans?
items.answer: Yes, all paid plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.

items.question: What happens to my data if I cancel?
items.answer: You can export all your data at any time. After cancellation, data is retained for 30 days before deletion.

items.question: Do you offer discounts for startups?
items.answer: Yes, we offer special pricing for early-stage startups. Contact our sales team to learn more.

about.title: About CodeGraft
about.subtitle: We're on a mission to make software architecture visible, understandable, and governable.

story.title: Our Story
story.content:
CodeGraft was born from a simple observation: as software systems grow, they become opaque. Documentation falls out of sync. Dependencies multiply. Compliance becomes a nightmare. We've lived this chaos as engineers and architects at some of the world's largest technology companies.

We built CodeGraft to be the 'MRI for the enterprise software stack' - a platform that makes the invisible visible, the complex understandable, and the chaotic governable.

Today, we're helping hundreds of engineering teams around the world understand their systems, reduce architectural debt, and ship with confidence.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To bridge the gap between intended architecture and deployed reality, enabling organizations to build software that's not just functional, but structurally sound.

items.title: Clarity Over Complexity
items.description: We believe complex systems can be understood. Our job is to make that understanding accessible to everyone.

items.title: Accuracy Above All
items.description: We're building a source of truth. That means no assumptions, no guesses - only verifiable reality.

items.title: Empowerment Through Visibility
items.description: When teams can see their systems clearly, they make better decisions. We give them that visibility.

items.title: Continuous Evolution
items.description: Software evolves. So should your understanding of it. We're built for change, not snapshots.

dispute.title: Dispute Resolution
dispute.content: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (OS): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr. We are not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using CodeGraft's services, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

services.title: 2. Description of Services
services.content: CodeGraft provides a structural integrity platform for software architecture governance, including visualization tools, AI-powered analysis, and integration capabilities. Services are provided on a subscription basis as described in your service agreement.

account.title: 3. Account Responsibilities
account.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

usage.title: 4. Acceptable Use
usage.content: You agree to use our services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms. You may not use our services to violate any applicable laws, infringe on intellectual property rights, or transmit harmful content.

data.title: 5. Data and Privacy
data.content: Your use of our services is also governed by our Privacy Policy. By using our services, you consent to the collection and use of information as described in our Privacy Policy.

ip.title: 6. Intellectual Property
ip.content: All content, features, and functionality of our services are owned by CodeGraft GmbH and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: CodeGraft shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of or inability to use our services.

termination.title: 8. Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your access to our services immediately, without prior notice, for any reason, including breach of these terms.

changes.title: 9. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of any material changes via email or through our services.

governing.title: 10. Governing Law
governing.content: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Germany, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: CodeGraft GmbH ('we', 'our', or 'us') is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our services.

collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, use our services, or contact us for support. This may include your name, email address, company information, and usage data.

usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
usage.content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, to process transactions, to send you technical notices and support messages, and to respond to your comments and questions.

sharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties. We may share information with trusted third-party service providers who assist us in operating our services, subject to confidentiality agreements.

security.title: 4. Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect the security of your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

retention.title: 5. Data Retention
retention.content: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy, unless a longer retention period is required by law.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights
rights.content: Under the GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You may also have the right to restrict or object to certain processing and to data portability.

cookies.title: 7. Cookies
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our services and hold certain information. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent.

changes.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the 'Last updated' date.

contact.title: 9. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@codegraft.com.

hero.title: Everything You Need to Master Your Architecture

graphRag.title: GraphRAG Intelligence
graphRag.description: Our semantic knowledge graph goes beyond simple text search. It understands the deep relationships between your code, documentation, infrastructure, and team knowledge - enabling natural language queries that return accurate, context-aware answers.
benefits: Natural language queries about your architecture
Automatic entity extraction from code and docs
Relationship mapping across all data sources

visualization.title: 3D Architecture Visualization
visualization.description: See your entire software ecosystem rendered in stunning WebGL-powered 3D graphics. Navigate through services, trace data flows, and identify hotspots with cinematic quality visualizations that make complex architectures intuitive.

ingestion.description: Connect your entire toolchain in minutes. CodeGraft ingests data from version control, cloud infrastructure, documentation platforms, project management tools, and more - building a unified knowledge graph automatically.

governance.title: Active Governance Engine
governance.description: Move from passive documentation to active enforcement. Define policies as code, set up automated action triggers, and ensure your architecture stays aligned with your intent - automatically.
